seo.title: About diBoaS | Built for the People Banks Forgot
seo.description: diBoaS was built because one grandmother deserved better. Now everyone does. Free transfers, real growth options, starting at $5.
seo.ogTitle: About diBoaS | Built for the People Banks Forgot
seo.ogDescription: diBoaS was built because one grandmother deserved better. Now everyone does. Free transfers, real growth options, starting at $5.

hero.title: One grandmother. One problem. One platform.
hero.subtitle: Open access and fair opportunities for everyone.

transitions.t1: Let me tell you a story.
transitions.t3: And it's not just for individuals.
transitions.t4: Want to talk? I'm right here.

story.paragraph1: My grandmother lived in Rio de Janeiro her whole life. She taught me to save. She said I should try to save half of everything I earn. She tried that herself. Her whole life.
story.paragraph2: Work hard. Buy only the basics. Try to save.
story.gapExplanation: Here's what no one told her: her bank paid her almost nothing while earning real returns with her money. That gap, between what banks earn and what they share, is the system working as designed. Just not for people like her.
story.accessLocked: Access was locked behind high minimums, complicated words, and institutions that didn't care about people with small savings.
story.turning: In 2024, I decided to do something about this problem. New technology made it possible to bypass the gatekeepers. I just had to build the door.

money.title: Your money should work for you.
money.description: Not for your bank. Not for a middleman. For you.

honesty.title: Honesty over hype.
honesty.description: We don't promise guaranteed returns because nobody can. What we offer: real data, clear explanations. You understand what you're doing before you do it.

startSmall.title: Start with $5. Learn as you go.
startSmall.description: Open access to Wealth Building. We built the door for you to access the best opportunities and be able to build your wealth and keep control of your money.

mission.story: Adelaide never had a choice. High minimums, hidden fees, and complicated words kept the door closed.
mission.statement: We're building the door she never got.
mission.pillars: Free money movement. Real growth options. Full transparency. For everyone.

business.description: If you accept card payments, processing fees eat into every transaction. If you have cash sitting idle, your bank is earning returns with it and paying you almost nothing. The same system that failed my grandmother is sitting on your company's reserves.
business.pitch: diBoaS for Business helps companies keep more of what they earn, with same-day liquidity, board-ready reporting, and access to the same trusted systems powering our personal platform.
business.cta: Learn more about diBoaS for Business

story.ariaLabel: The Story, her name was Adelaide
